summary: Recurring Monthly Income — backend pytest suite (10/10 PASS) and frontend E2E flow all green on a fresh family. Verified: income type select (default Recurring monthly), Monthly badge on recurring rows, ScopePicker dialogs on edit AND delete with all 3 testids, this_month override correctly updates only the chosen month (3500 -> 4000 for 2026-06), Family Dashboard + Forecast immediately reflect recurring income.

minor.issue: When category=='primary' is POSTed WITHOUT an explicit `type` field, server defaults to type='one_time' instead of 'recurring'. The startup migration only normalises pre-existing legacy rows; new programmatic POSTs from any client that doesn't send `type` will land as one-time. UI explicitly defaults to recurring so user-facing flow is unaffected, but API contract is inconsistent with the migration policy.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Make POST /api/budget/income treat missing `type` + category=='primary' as recurring to match the migration policy. Current default is one_time, which only matters for non-UI clients.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/HomeBudget.jsx is 1798 lines — past the 700-line threshold. Worth splitting ScopePicker, editors and Row helpers into separate files.
Default-`type` discrepancy: server normalises legacy primary rows on startup but doesn't normalise on insert. Either backfill on insert too, or document that all callers must send `type` explicitly.
test_credentials: Tests bootstrap fresh families via /api/auth/register + verify_account_email helper; no shared credentials used.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates an isolated family (email pattern qa-rec-* / qa-fe-*). Old test families remain in DB but are inert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest: cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://family-timeplan.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest tests/test_recurring_income.py -v (10/10 PASS, 24s). Frontend flow uses REST bootstrap (register -> verify via /var/log/supervisor/backend.*.log token grep -> login -> add member -> select PIN 1234) then injects mfml_account_token + mfml_member_token into localStorage and navigates to /home-budget. ScopePicker testids: budget-scope-this-month / budget-scope-forward / budget-scope-all / budget-scope-cancel. Recurring badge: budget-income-recurring-<id>. Add-income button: budget-add-income-btn.
rca_of_the_issue: No outstanding bug. Only a low-severity API-contract inconsistency (default `type` is one_time on POST while migration promotes legacy primary to recurring).
